package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationAllocationInHashOrLessFunc() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_allocation_in_hash_or_less_func"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag allocations inside sort comparison or hashing callbacks."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
